I am saddened by the passing of Senator Lindsey Graham. He dedicated his life to serving our country, first in uniform and then for decades in Congress. His leadership on national security and his commitment to public service left a lasting impact on our nation.

My thoughts and

I’m proud to see the bipartisan 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act become law today. 

This is a major win for Long Island families, increasing housing supply, strengthening our community banks, and expanding opportunities for more families to own a home.

That's why I'm proud to work across the aisle with Rep. Castor to push for commonsense reforms that eliminate unnecessary barriers to Medicare and Social Security Disability benefits.

Great to be in Massapequa celebrating Independence Day with so many Long Island families.

Thank you to the veterans, first responders, local leaders, and community organizations who help make this parade such a special tradition each year. https://t.co/IK1pfB1Mgg

As we celebrate America’s 250th birthday, we honor the generations of Americans whose service and sacrifice secured the freedoms we enjoy today.

Wishing everyone across the country a safe and happy Independence Day. https://t.co/G3Og8LbkPR

Please stay hydrated, limit time outdoors when possible, check on older neighbors and loved ones, and never leave children or pets in parked cars.

Stay safe this Fourth of July weekend. https://t.co/nstTR93a7J
